name: youtube-learning
description: Learn from YouTube videos by decoding speaker context, worldviews, source evidence, and reusable learning atoms; also discover credible videos for an article or thesis.

interface.shortDescription: Decode YouTube videos into worldviews and find credible supporting videos
interface.longDescription: YouTube Learning converts the Antigravity /youtube-learn and /youtube-discover workflows into a Codex plugin. It routes YouTube links through transcript capture, factual speaker research, human-readable speaker authority mapping, Socratic belief archaeology, worldview synthesis, Brain2 comparison, and optional atomization. The primary result is a full, detailed, Vietnamese-first analysis in chat; files are only supporting artifacts when useful. It also turns an article or thesis into a curated list of credible YouTube videos with strict channel verification, no fake viewing claims, and copy-ready Vietnamese explanations.
defaultPrompt: Turn this talk into Brain2 atoms
